name: Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express operates 34+ physical locations in the Houston area offering check cashing, payday loans, installment loans, and title loans with same-day funding options.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating multiple physical storefronts across the Houston, Texas metropolitan area. The company has been providing alternative financial services to consumers who need quick access to cash or check cashing services. Based on the website content, ACE maintains at least 34 store locations throughout Houston and surrounding areas like Pasadena, indicating a significant physical presence in the region.

ACE Cash Express offers a range of short-term financial products including check cashing, payday loans, installment loans, and title loans. Their services are designed for consumers seeking immediate liquidity, with same-day or next-day funding capability. The company operates extended hours at most locations, with typical store hours ranging from 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM, and some locations offering even later hours (8:00 PM) to accommodate working consumers.

The company distinguishes itself through widespread store accessibility, with locations distributed across different Houston neighborhoods and nearby communities. This physical footprint allows customers to access services without geographic barriers. ACE also runs promotional campaigns (such as their back-to-school gift card contest mentioned on the site) and maintains active communication with customers about service updates and location changes.

While ACE provides accessible emergency financial services, consumers should understand that payday loans, title loans, and installment loans typically carry high interest rates and fees. The company's service model is built around short-term lending rather than credit-building or long-term financial solutions. Borrowers should carefully review terms and consider whether alternative solutions or assistance programs might better serve their financial situation.
pros: 34+ physical store locations throughout Houston area for convenient in-person access
Extended daily hours (typically 9 AM-7 PM, some until 8 PM) accommodating working adults
Multiple loan products available including payday, installment, and title loans for different needs
Same-day or next-day funding capability for emergency cash situations
Check cashing services available at all locations for customers needing cash access
Established presence with recognizable brand and multiple service points
Customer communication about service updates and location information
cons: Payday and title loans typically carry high APR rates and significant fees, creating debt traps for some borrowers
Limited to physical store locations only—no online application or mobile lending platform mentioned
No mention of credit building, financial counseling, or alternatives to short-term lending
Title loans require collateral (vehicle), risking repossession if borrower defaults
Service model focuses on short-term liquidity rather than sustainable financial solutions
best_for: Consumers needing immediate check cashing with same-day access to funds
Workers in emergency situations requiring quick cash bridge loans between paychecks
Individuals with vehicles who have unexpected expenses and need title loan options
Unbanked or underbanked residents in Houston area lacking traditional bank account access
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers in the Houston area with immediate, temporary cash needs who have convenient access to physical locations and prefer in-person transactions. The primary caveat is that their core products—payday, installment, and title loans—carry substantial costs and risks; borrowers should exhaust other options (employer advances, credit unions, non-profit assistance) before using these services, as high fees and interest can perpetuate financial hardship rather than resolve it.
services: Money orders (implied through financial services offering)
Bill payment services (implied through financial services offering)
Wire transfers (implied through financial services offering)
Extended-hours customer service at multiple locations
meta_description: ACE Cash Express operates 34+ Houston-area locations offering check cashing, payday loans, installment loans, and title loans.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
